rationale: In the editorial, Toubia (2021) is cited as one example among many papers in the special issue. The mentions describe, at a high level, that the paper collected scripts/abstracts and used a Poisson factorization topic model for text summarization, but this serves an illustrative role in a broader methods overview. The citing paper does not build its own framework, hypotheses, or analysis on this specific paper, so the citation functions as a contextual example rather than a substantive dependency.
